This is a sample text file for testing the RAG system.

The RAG system can process various document formats including plain text files.
It chunks the text into smaller segments and stores them as vector embeddings.

When you query the system, it uses semantic search to find the most relevant chunks.
These chunks are then used as context for the LLM to generate an answer.

Key features:
- Document ingestion from files and URLs
- Multiple embedding providers support
- Semantic search capabilities
- Grounded responses with citations
